caption: The video captures a scene of a man speaking into a microphone while standing behind a podium. He is dressed in a white shirt and a black vest adorned with intricate designs, including a red emblem on his chest. The audience, seated in front of him, appears attentive, with some individuals turning their heads slightly as if listening closely or engaging with the speaker. The setting seems to be an indoor venue with wooden blinds covering the windows in the background, suggesting a formal or semi-formal event. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, possibly indicating the organization or event name. The atmosphere conveys a sense of seriousness and focus, as the speaker delivers his message to the gathered crowd.
